title: Excalibur | Cobblemon Support
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack.

This pack is currently incomplete and still WIP. For now, I'm not going to do the full [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon) support, just the In Game UI.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_debe857c-20d9-406b-8401-671fe477acd4.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_319e5aa0-cf90-42ee-8903-f2bf55548a28.png)

**Credits:**

*   [Maffhew](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) – Creator of Excalibur
*   CobbledStudios - Creator of [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)
